title: Mukesh Karkey : How can I create a project scheduling engine using the Timeline or Gantt view?
excerpt: Hi, Mukesh Karkey here, A great project scheduling engine needs to be able to handle dependencies, milestones, and task durations. To give you the best advice, I’ll need a bit more detail. Could you tell me about the spe…

posts.author: mukeshkarkey (mukesh karkey)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, Mukesh Karkey here, A great project scheduling engine needs to be able to handle dependencies, milestones, and task durations. To give you the best advice, I’ll need a bit more detail. Could you tell me about the specific features you want to include, and what kind of project you’re trying to schedule?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Looks like you posted in the wrong spot?
